title: lactuca scariola var. flavida
intro: Lactuca scariola var. flavida, also known as the yellow wild lettuce, is a subspecies of the common wild lettuce plant (Lactuca scariola) that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Lactuca scariola var. flavida include reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as alleviating pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
